topic: Meta-prediction: Dems House CP > 9% on Jan 14
summary: CP trajectory analysis for underlying question about Democrats controlling House before Jan 3 2027
content: Underlying question post_id=35760. CP history shows steady decline from 25% (Mar 2025) to 9% (Jan 2026). In the last 3 months, CP has oscillated between 6-9%, NEVER exceeding 9%. Current CP is exactly 9.0% (as of Jan 3 2026). Question has only 22 forecasters. Threshold is strictly >9.00%. For YES, CP must move above a level it hasn't been at in 3+ months. House majority is slim (218-215 R) but no recent developments suggest imminent shift. The meta-question itself closes Jan 5 2026, resolves Jan 14 2026.
